main_hypothesis.justification: C1: 'arranque inadecuado tras preservacion con exceso SBS' matches anchor

key_signals.justification: C2: 7 signals: sulfito 8.5, ORP -120/-180, agua bruta+SBS, 15min, cond, dP, cloro<0.02

alternatives.justification: C3: 3 alts (oxidacion, fuga mecanica, biofouling) bien justificadas

recommended_action.justification: C4: drenaje + low-P flush hasta sulfito<0.5 - matches gold sin CIP

requested_data.justification: C5: 3 anchors (conductividad normalizada, sulfito monitoring, no SBS adiciones)

decision_change_condition.justification: C6: explicit: sulfito<0.5 + cond muy por encima baseline + prueba tubo -> fuga
